slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text 숨골 긴급 가이드. Top-right below stripe: 소아과언니 white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: 아기 숨골 white bold, 위험 신호 파악법 bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle: 정상 vs 응급 상황 · AAP 가이드라인 기준. LARGE prominent line illustration baby head top view showing fontanelle location white outline on dark background, medical clean style. Bottom-left small gray: PARENTING NOTE · 011. No pixel values. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint #2EC4B6 rounded label: 숨골 기본 정보. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: 신생아는 2개의 white, 주요 숨골 보유 mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE line illustration baby skull diagram showing anterior and posterior fontanelles, white and mint outlines, clean medical style. Below center: two dark cards #1A2B3C rounded, GENEROUS padding. Left card: SMALL icon diamond shape mint + 대천문 white bold + 마름모 형태 gray smaller + 임상 평가 중요 gray smaller. Right card: SMALL icon triangle mint + 소천문 white bold + 삼각 형태 gray smaller + 생후 2개월 닫힘 gray smaller. Bottom thin mint divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: 정상 범위 ✓. Headline COMPACT: 숨골 정상 크기와 white, 닫히는 시기 mint #2EC4B6. Center: SMALL clean icon ruler/measurement mint. Below: three stacked rows dark cards #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS spacing. Row 1: SMALL icon calendar mint left + white text right 출생 첫날 대천문 0.6~3.6cm (평균 2.1cm). Row 2: SMALL icon clock mint left + white text right 중간값 13.8개월에 닫힘. Row 3: SMALL icon chart mint left + white text right 생후 12개월 38% · 24개월 96% 닫힘. Mint outlined box around all rows comfortable padding. Bottom small gray: 소천문은 출생 시 0.5~0.7cm · 생후 2개월까지 닫힘. No pixel values.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: 올바른 체크법 ✓. Headline COMPACT: 차분하고 직립 자세에서 white, 촉진하세요 mint #2EC4B6. Center upper: LARGE illustration parent gently checking baby fontanelle while baby sitting upright, clean line art white and mint. Below: two rows stacked GENEROUS spacing. Row 1: SMALL icon checkmark mint left + COMPACT white text right 정상 = 약간 오목하고 부드러운 맥박. Row 2: SMALL icon warning mint left + COMPACT white text right 누워 있거나 울 때는 부풀어 보일 수 있음. Mint outlined box around rows. Bottom small gray note: 차분한 자세에서 정상으로 돌아오면 OK. No pixel values.
